testcase.name: test_auto_weight_assignment

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 0.18 == 0.25 + where 0.18 = DimensionScoreCreate(assessment_id=UUID('b1000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'), dimension=<Dimension.DATA_INFRASTRUCTURE: 'data_infrastructure'>, score=80.0, weight=0.18, confidence=0.8, evidence_count=0).weight

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_models.TestDimensionScoreCreate object at 0x7f227cb9e910> sample_assessment_id = 'b1000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'
def test_auto_weight_assignment(self, sample_assessment_id): """Test that weight is auto-assigned based on dimension.""" data = {"assessment_id": sample_assessment_id, "dimension": "data_infrastructure", "score": 80.0} score = DimensionScoreCreate(**data) > assert score.weight == 0.25 E AssertionError: assert 0.18 == 0.25 E + where 0.18 = DimensionScoreCreate(assessment_id=UUID('b1000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'), dimension=<Dimension.DATA_INFRASTRUCTURE: 'data_infrastructure'>, score=80.0, weight=0.18, confidence=0.8, evidence_count=0).weight
tests/test_models.py:126: AssertionError
